title: Press Communiqué
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Press Communiqué

Posted On:
10 APR 2026 7:03PM by PIB Delhi

 In exercise of the power conferred by the Constitution of India, the President of India, after consultation with Chief Justice of India, is pleased to appoint the following Additional Judges as Permanent Judges of the Madras High Court:

S. No.

Name of the Additional Judge

Details



Ms. Justice R. Poornima,

Appointed as Judges of the Madras High Court



Shri Justice M. Jothiraman  and



Dr. Justice Augustine Devadoss Maria Clete




***

Samrat/Pranab

(Release ID: 2250930)

Visitor Counter : 116
